items.name: Photography Walk & Lesson -- Trapani Old Town
items.description: Learn photography while exploring Trapani's stunning old town. Composition, lighting, street photography, golden hour techniques. Bring your camera (phone is fine too). items.name: Lezione di cucina siciliana -- pasta fresca e dolci
items.description: Vi insegno a fare la pasta fresca (busiate, cavatelli, ravioli) e i dolci siciliani (cannoli, cassata, frutta di Martorana). Ricette della nonna, niente scorciatoie. Cuciniamo insieme e poi mangiamo tutto. La mia cucina, i miei ingredienti, la vostra fame.

media.alt_text: Making fresh pasta by hand in Sicilian kitchen

listings.notes: 3 ore, pranzo incluso (mangiamo quello che cuciniamo). Massimo 4 persone. Ingredienti inclusi. Portate il grembiule o ve ne presto uno. Mercoledì e venerdì pomeriggio.

items.name: Electronics & Soldering Workshop for Beginners
items.description: Learn to solder, read schematics, and build your first circuit. We'll start with basic theory (15 min), then hands-on: through-hole soldering, desoldering, component identification. You leave with a working LED blinker circuit you built yourself. All materials included.

items.name: Corso cura olivi e potatura -- 50 anni di esperienza
items.description: Vi insegno tutto sugli ulivi: potatura di formazione, potatura di produzione, trattamento della mosca olearia, raccolta, e spremitura. Lavoriamo nel mio oliveto (12 alberi). Teoria la mattina, pratica il pomeriggio. Portate guanti da lavoro e scarpe robuste.

media.alt_text: Olive trees in Mediterranean garden

items.name: Mobili su misura in legno massello

items.name: Commissioned Portrait Painting -- Oil on Canvas

items.name: Custom 3D Printed Parts & Prototypes
items.description: Send me your STL file or describe what you need, and I'll print it. PLA, PETG, or TPU materials. Max build volume 220x220x250mm. Consulenza telefonica con foto: EUR 30/ora. Vi dico cosa piantare, quando, e come curarlo. Niente visite, solo consigli pratici.

listings.notes: Perfect for students not ready to buy. Monthly rental: EUR 60. I deliver and tune the stand. Lesson discount: EUR 10/day if taking lessons with me.
Piano lessons for beginners to intermediate. Classical, pop, jazz basics. 45-minute sessions at my studio or your home.

items.story: I have 3 of these because students kept asking 'Where can I practice?' Now they rent one, take it home, and practice between lessons. Everyone deserves a piano that feels real.

items.name: Guitar Collection (Acoustic, Classical, Electric)
items.description: 3 guitars: Yamaha FG800 acoustic (steel string), Cordoba C5 classical (nylon string), Squier Stratocaster electric with Fender Champion 20 amp. Each comes with case, picks, strap, and tuner.

media.alt_text: Three guitars - acoustic, classical, and electric
Acoustic guitar close-up with warm wood grain
Electric guitar with amplifier setup

listings.notes: Rent one or all three. Monthly rate: EUR 30/guitar. Fresh strings on every rental. Beginners welcome -- I'll show you 3 chords in 5 minutes.

items.name: MIG Welder (Lincoln Electric 180A)
items.description: Lincoln Electric 180A MIG welder with gas kit. Welds mild steel, stainless, and aluminum (with spool gun). Duty cycle: 30% at 180A. Includes 2kg wire spool, gas regulator, and welding mask.

media.alt_text: Lincoln Electric MIG welder setup
MIG welding in progress - bright arc
Welder complete kit with mask and gloves

listings.notes: Includes welding mask, gloves, and wire brush. You supply your own gas (Argon/CO2 mix). I have gas bottles for EUR 10/day extra.

items.story: Lincoln built this machine to last 30 years. It's only 8 years old and has welded everything from trailer hitches to garden gates. Smooth arc, clean welds.

items.name: Plasma Cutter (Hypertherm Powermax 45)
items.description: Hypertherm Powermax 45 plasma cutter. Cuts up to 16mm steel, 12mm stainless, 12mm aluminum. Clean cuts, minimal cleanup. Includes 2 consumable sets, air compressor connection, and hand torch.

media.alt_text: Hypertherm plasma cutter unit
Plasma cutting steel plate - sparks flying

listings.notes: Needs compressed air supply (6 bar minimum). Consumables included for light use. Heavy use = EUR 15 consumable charge.

items.name: TIG Welder (Miller Syncrowave 210)
items.description: Miller Syncrowave 210 AC/DC TIG welder. The precision tool -- perfect for stainless steel, aluminum, chromoly. Foot pedal control, water-cooled torch, 10 tungsten electrodes. For clean, beautiful welds.

media.alt_text: Miller TIG welder with foot pedal and torch
TIG welding stainless steel - precision bead
Complete TIG setup with gas bottle and accessories

listings.notes: TIG is an art -- if you haven't done it before, book a training session first (EUR 30/hr). Argon gas bottle included.
Learn TIG welding from a 30-year pro. 3-hour intro session. You'll weld a practice joint and take it home.

items.name: Upholstery Tool Kit (Professional)
items.description: Complete upholstery toolkit: pneumatic staple gun, tack puller, webbing stretcher, foam cutter, sewing awl, regulator needle, fabric scissors, and 3 rolls of jute webbing. Everything to reupholster a sofa or chair.

listings.notes: Staple gun needs air compressor (rent separately or use mine at the workshop). I can advise on fabric selection.
Bring a chair, I'll teach you to strip and reupholster it. Full project usually takes 4-6 hours.

items.name: Furniture Clamp Set (24 pieces)
items.description: 24-piece clamp set: 4 x bar clamps (900mm), 4 x bar clamps (600mm), 8 x F-clamps (various), 4 x spring clamps, 4 x band clamps. Plus wood glue and cauls. Enough to glue up a dining table.

media.alt_text: Furniture clamps holding table top glue-up
Bar clamps and F-clamps assorted set

listings.notes: Clean off glue squeeze-out before return. Weekly rate: EUR 40.

items.name: Floor Sander & Edger (Bona)
items.description: Bona FlexiSand belt sander + Bona edge sander. Professional floor refinishing kit. Includes dust bag, sanding belts (40/60/80/120 grit), and finishing pads. Sand a 30sqm room in one day.

media.alt_text: Bona floor sander on hardwood floor
Freshly sanded and finished hardwood floor

listings.notes: Sanding belts included for one room. Extra belts EUR 8/set. I'll deliver and show you the technique. Dust bag MUST be emptied frequently.

items.name: 4-Person Tent (MSR Habitude 4)
items.description: MSR Habitude 4 camping tent. Sleeps 4 comfortably. Full mesh inner, waterproof fly, 2 doors, 2 vestibules. Sets up in 10 minutes. Includes footprint groundsheet and repair kit.

media.alt_text: MSR tent pitched in scenic campsite
Tent interior with sleeping bags set up
Camping under the stars - tent with fairy lights

listings.notes: Shake out sand before packing. Dry the fly if it rained. I deliver to campgrounds within 20km of San Vito. Weekly rate: EUR 60.

items.name: Camping Kitchen Kit (Full Setup)
items.description: Complete camp kitchen: 2-burner stove, 4-person cookware set, utensils, cutting board, collapsible wash basin, water container (20L), and fold-out kitchen table with windscreen. Cook like home, outdoors.

media.alt_text: Camp kitchen setup with stove and cookware
Outdoor cooking at campsite with mountain view

listings.notes: Gas canisters not included (buy at any petrol station). Clean all pots before return. Weekly rate: EUR 50.

items.name: Rock Climbing Gear Set (2 person)
items.description: 2-person climbing kit: 2 harnesses (adjustable), 60m dynamic rope (9.5mm), 12 quickdraws, 4 locking carabiners, belay device (ATC), chalk bags, and helmet. All UIAA certified. Inspected before every rental.

media.alt_text: Rock climbing gear - harness, rope, and carabiners
Climbing quickdraws and locking carabiners
Climber on rock face with Mediterranean view

listings.notes: EXPERIENCED CLIMBERS ONLY. I inspect every piece before and after rental. Rope and harnesses have log books. San Vito has world-class limestone routes.
Half-day intro to outdoor climbing. Gear included. Meet at the crag. You'll learn to belay, tie in, and climb your first 5a route.

items.story: San Vito lo Capo has some of the best climbing in Europe. Tourists fly in from Germany and France just for the rock. Why buy gear you'll use twice a year? Rent mine.

items.name: Kitesurf Complete Kit (Cabrinha)
items.description: Cabrinha Switchblade 12m kite, bar and lines, harness (M/L), and 140cm twin-tip board. Intermediate setup, perfect for 12-25 knot wind. Pump and repair kit included.

media.alt_text: Kitesurf kite inflated on the beach

listings.notes: MUST show IKO certification or equivalent experience. Beginners: book a lesson instead. Rinse everything with fresh water after session.
3-hour kitesurf lesson. All gear included. Beach safety, kite control, water start. Group of 2 max.

items.story: The Trapani coast has perfect thermal winds May through October. Flat water, consistent side-on. This is where I learned, and this kite has taught 200 students.

items.name: Windsurf Board & Sail Set
items.description: Freeride windsurf board (150L), boom, mast, and 5.5m sail. Stable enough for beginners, fast enough for intermediates. Includes wetsuit (M or L), harness, and roof rack pads.

media.alt_text: Windsurf board and sail on beach

items.name: Snorkeling Gear Set (4 person)
items.description: 4 complete snorkeling sets: masks (tempered glass, silicone skirt), dry-top snorkels, and fins (sizes 38-46). Plus underwater camera (GoPro Hero 8) with waterproof housing. See the Egadi marine reserve in HD.

media.alt_text: Snorkeling gear set - masks, fins, and snorkels
Snorkeling in clear Mediterranean water
Underwater camera with waterproof housing

items.name: Inflatable Dinghy with Outboard (3.3m)
items.description: 3.3m rigid inflatable dinghy with 15HP Mercury outboard. Seats 4. Plywood floor, aluminum keel. Perfect for exploring coves, fishing, or getting to Favignana without the ferry. Fuel tank and anchor included.

listings.notes: Boat license required (patente nautica). Fuel not included. Life jackets for 4 included. Return by sunset. Half-day rate: EUR 40.

items.name: Wetsuit Collection (Full Range)
items.description: 8 wetsuits in stock: 3mm shorties (S/M/L), 3mm full suits (S/M/L/XL), and 5mm winter suit (M/L). Billabong and O'Neill brands. For surfing, diving, kitesurfing, or just cold-water swimming.

media.alt_text: Wetsuits hanging to dry on rack

listings.notes: Rinse inside and out with fresh water after use. Hang to dry in shade (not direct sun). Weekly rate: EUR 30.

items.name: MacBook Pro M2 (14-inch)

Laptop with USB-C hub and accessories

Drone controller and Fly More accessories
Aerial view of Sicilian coastline from drone

listings.notes: EU drone license (A1/A3) required. Insurance proof needed. I brief you on local no-fly zones. 3 batteries = ~2 hours total flight time.
